content.text:
Context: This summary will be shown in a list to help users and Claude choose which conversations are relevant.

Please write a concise, factual summary that synthesizes these part-summaries into one cohesive paragraph. Focus on what was accomplished and any notable technical decisions or challenges. Output in <summary></summary> tags. Claude will see this summary when searching previous conversations for useful memories and information.

Part summaries:
1. Discussed brainstorming approach for StockPick AI Phase 2 (visualization) and Phase 3 (data pipeline). Decided on parallel development with Phase 1 core (experience_level + LevelGate) as prerequisite, gradual sentiment analysis upgrade from keyword-based to KoELECTRA/FinBERT, and full P0+P1 infrastructure scope including DART/SEC collectors and Render Docker worker pipeline.
2. 설계 문서와 구현 계획 (23개 태스크)를 완성했고, 서브에이전트 방식으로 Task 1~3을 실행 완료했습니다. Task 1에서는 ExperienceLevel enum과 User 모델을 추가, Task 2는 Alembic 마이그레이션을 작성, Task 3는 PATCH /profile API를 확장해 experience_level 필드를 지원하도록 구현했습니다.
3. Phase 1~4의 StockPick AI 풀스택 개발을 완료(24개 커밋): LevelGate 컴포넌트·4/5축 자동전환 레이더 차트·매크로 데이터 수집 파이프라인·5축 통합 스코어러 구현. 진행 내용을 `02_phase2-3-completion.md`로 정리하고, 남은 작업(온보딩/히트맵/페이퍼트레이딩/백테스트/자동매매)을 `03_remaining-tasks.md`로 명세화.

Good:
<summary>Built conversation search system with JavaScript, sqlite-vec, and local embeddings. Implemented hierarchical summarization for long conversations. System archives conversations permanently and provides semantic search via CLI.</summary>

Bad:
<summary>This conversation synthesizes several topics discussed across multiple parts...</summary>

Your summary (max 200 words):

<summary>
Completed StockPick AI full-stack development through Phase 1-4 across 24 commits. Implemented core features including experience level gating with LevelGate component, 4/5-axis auto-switching radar charts for macro data visualization, macro data collection pipeline, and 5-axis integrated scorer. Development followed a phased approach: Phase 1 established experience_level enum and user profile management (Tasks 1-3: ExperienceLevel enum addition, Alembic migrations, PATCH /profile API extension), Phase 2 added visualization components, and Phases 3-4 implemented the data pipeline infrastructure (DART/SEC collectors) and Render Docker worker pipeline. Documented completion in `02_phase2-3-completion.md` with detailed implementation notes and identified remaining work in `03_remaining-tasks.md` (onboarding flows, heatmaps, paper trading, backtesting, automated trading). Architecture supports gradual sentiment analysis upgrades from keyword-based to KoELECTRA/FinBERT models. Demonstrated parallel development capability with coordinated sub-agent execution across infrastructure, backend, and frontend layers.
</summary>
